indicators: Support/Resistance levels, candlestick patterns (reverse hammer, doji)
entry_rules: Enter when price pulls back into an OTZ (optimal trading zone) identified by recency and frequency rules; confirm with selling pressure on lower timeframe (e.g., reverse hammer + close below candle)

strategy_name: Support and Resistance with Price Action Patterns
timeframe: Not explicitly specified; mentions lower timeframes for entries
indicators: Average True Range (ATR)
entry_rules: Double top or double bottom with confirmation candle (red for double top, green for double bottom) at major support/resistance zones identified by recent structure breaks or multiple historical tests
exit_rules: Stop loss placed ATR pips below swing low; target set for 1.4:1 or better reward-to-risk ratio
claimed_performance: ~65% win rate on pullback entries; author claims consistent profitability with this approach over decade-long trading career

strategy_name: Multi-Asset Trend Following with Price Action
timeframe: Weekly and daily charts, with 4-hour chart for lower timeframe confirmation
indicators: 20 EMA, 50 EMA, 200 EMA
entry_rules: Trade breakouts above resistance on uptrends (USD/JPY); short flag patterns and neckline breaks on downtrends (AUD/NZD, Platinum); short pin bar rejections and failed breakouts (Gold); retest of moving averages as dynamic support/resistance
exit_rules: Stop loss above swing highs or recent resistance; take profit at identified support/resistance levels and previous swing lows
claimed_performance: Not specified; presenter mentions missing some trades but successfully trading others (e.g., AUD/NZD short from 50 EMA retest)

strategy_name: Support and Resistance Trading with Reversals and Multi-Timeframe Analysis
timeframe: Multi-timeframe: identify levels on daily/higher timeframes, execute entries on 4-hour and 1-hour charts
indicators: 50-period moving average, support/resistance zones, higher timeframe structure levels
entry_rules: Enter reversals at support/resistance zones after 1-2-3 move pattern confirmation; use lower timeframe entry reasons (price action patterns like double bottom, head and shoulders); enter on confirmation candles; look for pullbacks into broken support/resistance levels
exit_rules: Stop loss just below support level; target at previous resistance level; exit when price action no longer confirms the setup
claimed_performance: Profitable trades demonstrated on EUR/USD, GBP/USD, AUD/USD, USD/JPY with specific examples hitting targets
